duplicate.description: This issue or pull request already exists.

needs-info.description: More issue-specific reporter detail is needed before the problem can be confidently triaged.

triaged.description: Issue has received an initial automated triage pass.

ready-to-spec.description: The issue is ready for a product and technical spec.

needs-mocks.description: The issue requires UI mocks from from Warp's design team before implementation can begin.

ready-to-implement.description: The issue is ready for implementation work.

repro:high.description: The report includes enough evidence that the issue appears highly reproducible.

repro:medium.description: The report suggests a plausible repro path, but some uncertainty remains.

repro:low.description: The report points to a real problem, but reproduction details are weak or inconsistent.

repro:unknown.description: The report does not provide enough evidence to estimate reproducibility yet.

area:agent.description: Agent workflows, conversations, prompts, cloud mode, and AI-specific UI.

area:auth.description: Authentication, login, SSO, session management, and account security.

area:billing.description: Pricing, plans, subscriptions, payment, and billing management.

area:code-review.description: Git diff views, review UI, review comments, and PR-focused agent flows.

area:completions.description: Standard shell completions, argument completions, and path completion.

area:editor-notebooks.description: Editors, notebooks, markdown rendering, LSP, and code display.

area:launch-configs.description: Launch configurations, workflows, tab configs, and automation entry points.

area:mcp.description: MCP server integrations, tool connections, and resource providers.

area:onboarding.description: First-run experience, onboarding flows, and related callouts.

area:performance.description: General application performance, responsiveness, and resource usage.

area:performance:cpu.description: CPU utilization, process efficiency, and compute-bound performance.

area:performance:memory.description: Memory usage, allocation, leaks, and memory-bound performance.

area:performance:gpu.description: GPU utilization, rendering performance, and graphics resource usage.

area:search.description: Global search, command palette, and content discovery.

area:settings-keybindings.description: Settings UI, preferences, keybindings, and keyboard-shortcut management.

area:shell-terminal.description: Terminal output, shell integration, prompt rendering, and block display.

area:skills.description: Agent skills, skill authoring, and skill execution.

area:suggestions.description: AI-predictive suggestions, prompt predictions, next-command suggestions, and auto-suggest heuristics.

area:terminal-input.description: Terminal command-line input, cursor movement, key handling, and input editing.

area:ssh.description: SSH and remote-session behavior, including tmux-related terminal flows.

area:ui-framework.description: Core Warp UI framework, rendering, layout, and windowing infrastructure.

area:warp-drive.description: Warp Drive objects, sync, sharing, cloud object management, and persisted artifacts.

area:window-tabs-panes.description: Window, tab, pane, and layout management.

area:workspace.description: File tree, workspace navigation, project switching, and working-directory management.
